ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the stock (e.g., MHL) */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the stock belongs to */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the company operates */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock prices are quoted */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of the company's initial public offering (IPO) */,
  "market_capitalization" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date and time the stock symbol information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol the price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "open" REAL /* Open price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* High price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Close price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  "turnover" REAL /* Turnover of the stock on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted close price, accounting for corporate actions */,
  "change" REAL /* Change in price from the previous day's close */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day's close */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the stock price data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON column to store user permissions (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investor_stock_relations" (
  "relation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (investor) */,
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock symbol */,
  "shares" INTEGER /* Number of shares owned by the user */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the shares were purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the shares were purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_stock_relations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investor_stock_relations_symbol_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_id") REFERENCES stock_symbols ("symbol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_price_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date the revision was made */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the stock price */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the stock price */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision (e.g., data correction, corporate action) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_price_revisions_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)
